name: hallow-pst-plugin
description: Skills for the Hallow Parish Success team — HubSpot CRM automation, post-roadmap follow-ups, prayer challenge management, and partner drive access.

skills.name: post-roadmap
skills.description: Drafts a follow-up email after a parish roadmap meeting, creates HubSpot tasks and notes on the affiliated deal.

skills.name: sort-prayer-challenges
skills.description: Reorders a HubSpot parish deal's 8 prayer challenge slots into chronological order by launch date.

skills.name: partner-drive
skills.description: Reference catalogue of Hallow Parish Partner Drive files — Google Drive links for Partner Manual, templates, Herald resources, and more.

skills.name: ps-pipeline
skills.description: HubSpot standards and process reference for the Parish Success team — pipeline/stage IDs, task rules, note conventions, overdue definition.
